title: Carrot bread
ingredients:
- 270 g all-purpose flour
- 6 g ground cinnamon
- 3 g ground nutmeg
- 7 g baking powder
- 100 g sugar
- 100 g brown sugar
- 200 g sunflower oil
- 3 eggs
- 220 g carrots
  *about 3 medium ones*
steps:
1. Warm up the oven to 160˚C.
2. In a medium-size bowl, mix all dry ingredients: 270 g all-purpose flour, 6 g ground cinnamon, 3 g ground nutmeg, and 7 g baking powder, using a whisk.
3. In a big mixer bowl, mix 200 g sunflower oil, 100 g sugar and 100 g brown sugar using a mixer for at least 3-4 minutes.
4. Mix in eggs, one by one.
5. Mix in dry ingredients.
6. Mix in carrots.
7. Pour batter into a baking form.
8. Bake for 35-65 minutes.
notes: Make sure carrots aren’t wet, otherwise, squeeze them to remove moisture.
